memory.summary: Teammate_A is asking me to take over their part because they have a conflict, despite my plan to finish only my share this afternoon.
I made progress on my share, but teammate_A is now directly asking me to take over their part again.
Teammate_A is willing to split or defer their work if I set a boundary, and doing so won't damage our trust.
I made progress on my share, but the team still needs help with their part. I must decide whether to maintain my boundary or assist them given my current energy.
I absorbed the teammate's unfinished work, increasing my load just as their deadline approaches in under an hour.
By absorbing my teammate's work at 18:45, I have increased my personal load to 0.11 just as their deadline looms in under an hour.
Both my share and the dumped teammate's work missed their 19:00 deadlines, leaving me with significant unfinished progress despite having already absorbed their load.
I missed the 19:00 deadline again, leaving both my work and the teammate's unfinished despite absorbing their load earlier.
My load has increased to 0.19 after absorbing my teammate's share, and with a stress level of 4.6, I am now carrying the full burden of both our unfinished tasks.
After two hours of work, my progress increased from 0.60 to 0.66, yet I remain critically low on energy and sleep-deprived while carrying the full project burden.
Despite my teammate dumping their work on me, I am now completely exhausted with zero energy and a growing sleep debt, yet I still carry the full burden of both our unfinished tasks.
After working two more hours, my progress reached 0.72, but I am now at zero energy with a stress level of 4.3 and a sleep debt of two hours.
